title: Section 15
content: On and from the appointed day, no court or other authority shall have, or be entitled to, exercise any jurisdiction, powers or authority in relation to the matters referred to in 1 [sub-sections (1), (1A) and (1B)] of section 13.
footnote: 1. Subs by Act 7 of 2017, s. 162, for "sub-sections (1) and (1A)" (w.e.f. 26-5-2017).
